Texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information visit
Texts.Enum:PortfolioTargetAudienceType.Busines: Business owners looking for ERP / CRM / web application development
Texts.Permission:Projects.Manage: Create, update, and delete portfolio projects
Texts.Permission:Skills.Manage: Create, update, and delete portfolio skills
Texts.Permission:Experience.Manage: Create, update, and delete portfolio experience content
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010001: Portfolio identity must include Kareem's full name.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010002: Portfolio identity title must clearly show .NET full-stack positioning.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010003: Portfolio identity main message must focus on business systems.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010004: Portfolio identity must include a business-oriented summary.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010005: Portfolio identity is missing a required call-to-action: {CallToAction}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010101: Portfolio app shell must include a brand name.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010102: Portfolio app shell is missing a required route: {RouteType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010103: Portfolio app shell contains a duplicate route path: {RoutePath}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010104: Portfolio admin route must be protected: {RouteType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010105: Portfolio public route must not require authentication: {RouteType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010106: Portfolio footer is missing a required link: {FooterLinkType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010107: Portfolio app shell must define an anonymous wildcard not-found route.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010108: Portfolio admin route must define a required permission: {RouteType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010201: Portfolio home page is missing a required target audience: {TargetAudience}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010202: Portfolio home page must make .NET and Angular specialization obvious.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010203: Portfolio home page is missing a required tech stack card: {TechStackCardType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010204: Portfolio home page must include multiple featured projects.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010205: Portfolio home page is missing a required featured project: {FeaturedProjectType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010206: Portfolio home page is missing a required professional link: {ProfessionalLinkType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010207: Portfolio home page ERP highlight must include a project route.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010208: Portfolio home page ERP highlight is missing a required capability: {ErpCapabilityType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010209: Portfolio home page is missing a required business value item: {BusinessValueType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010210: Portfolio home page contact call-to-action must point to the contact experience.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010301: Portfolio experience section must include a headline.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010302: Portfolio experience section must include a short summary.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010303: Portfolio experience summary must stay concise and no longer than {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010304: Portfolio experience timeline is missing a required item: {TimelineItemType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010305: Portfolio experience must mark ERP delivery as the primary professional software experience.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010306: Portfolio experience section is missing a required highlight: {HighlightType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010307: Portfolio experience timeline item is missing a required field: {TimelineItemType}.{FieldName}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010308: Portfolio experience timeline item text is too long: {TimelineItemType}.{FieldName} exceeds {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010403: Portfolio skill name must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010404: Portfolio skill display order must be zero or greater.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010405: Portfolio skill '{Name}' already exists in category '{Category}'.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010503: Portfolio project title must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010505: Portfolio project slug '{Slug}' is invalid. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010506: Portfolio project slug must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010507: Portfolio project short summary is required.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010508: Portfolio project short summary must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010509: Portfolio project business value is required.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010510: Portfolio project business value must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010511: Portfolio project must include at least one technology.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010512: Portfolio project display order must be zero or greater.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010514: Portfolio project technology name is required.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010515: Portfolio project technology name must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010516: Portfolio project technology '{Technology}' is duplicated in the same project.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010517: Portfolio project field '{FieldName}' must contain a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL: {Url}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010518: Portfolio project case study was not found for slug '{Slug}'.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010519: Portfolio project case study slug is required.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010520: Portfolio project case study section '{SectionName}' is required.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010521: Portfolio project case study section '{SectionName}' must include at least one non-empty item.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010522: Portfolio project case study section '{SectionName}' field '{FieldName}' must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010523: Portfolio project case study gallery item '{Title}' is invalid for item type '{GalleryItemType}'.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010524: Portfolio project case study slug '{Slug}' is duplicated.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010525: Portfolio project case study highlight card '{HighlightType}' is invalid for field '{FieldName}'.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010601: Portfolio experience stage label is required.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010602: Portfolio experience stage label must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010604: Portfolio experience title must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010606: Portfolio experience organization must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010607: Portfolio experience business value is required.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010608: Portfolio experience business value must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010609: Portfolio experience display order must be zero or greater.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010610: Portfolio experience must include at least one highlight.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010611: Portfolio experience highlight must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010612: Portfolio experience highlight '{Highlight}' is duplicated in the same entry.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010615: Only Enterprise ERP delivery can be marked as the primary professional experience. Received: {ExperienceType}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010616: Only one portfolio experience can be marked as the primary professional experience.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010702: Contact message name must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010705: Contact message email must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010706: Contact message company must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010708: Contact message subject must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010710: Contact message body must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010711: Contact submission was rejected by spam protection.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010712: Portfolio contact message was not found: {MessageId}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010901: Invalid admin username, email, or password.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010902: This account is not allowed to access the portfolio admin area.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010904: This admin account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010905: The current admin session is no longer valid.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010801: Portfolio site setting key is required.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010802: Portfolio site setting key must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010803: Portfolio site setting key '{Key}' is invalid. Use lowercase letters, numbers, dots, and hyphens only.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010804: Portfolio site setting value is required.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010805: Portfolio site setting value must not exceed {MaxLength} characters.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010806: Portfolio site setting value is invalid for type '{ValueType}': {Value}.
Texts.kareem_fullstack_portfolio:010807: Portfolio site setting display order must be zero or greater.
